text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Suzuka?!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... J-just a dream...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's not much time until the Takarazuka Kinen, so we're hard at
work, training for the big day.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Squee! She's so fast, right from the start! I never get tired of watching Suzuka run.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
A style all her own, but one admired by racers everywhere! I get
goosebumps just standing here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her sudden sprint right out the gate is a key part of Silence Suzuka's
trademark style.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like she's making a mad dash for the finish line, yet she's
nowhere near it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Normal racers would slow down to conserve their stamina by now, but
not her! She's just getting started!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As if impelled by those words, Silence Suzuka's cleats kick harder
against the ground, sending her flying down the course even faster.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wooow! Her speed just shot up again!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Watching her run is like being in a dream. Fans and racers alike can't
contain their excitement—and to be honest, I'm can't quite hold it
back myself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With every lap, she gets better—faster. At this rate there's no telling
how far she'll—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You and Suzuka seek to boldly go where no racer has gone before.
The ideal you search for may even lie beyond an Umamusume's
capabilities.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: But when you cross that threshold, her legs...

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Suzuka?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I-is something wrong, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: N-no, it's nothing.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: N-no, it's nothing.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff... Phew...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Welcome back, Suzuka! That's another record!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes, I had a feeling I was going faster. Everything just felt right.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
At this rate, you're a shoo-in for the Takarazuka Kinen! Don't you
think, Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: ...Y-yeah, for sure.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: ...Y-yeah, for sure.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since my talk with Agnes Tachyon, I've been on a constant quest for
resources on racing injuries.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Is there any way to predict an incident? And if something happens,
what sort of future can Suzuka expect?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I had hoped research would alleviate my worries, but the more I read,
the more anxious I grow...

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
(This racer absolutely destroyed the competition in her debut race.
But her second race...)

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
(She started out great—amazing even. Everything was going smoothly
as she entered the homestretch...)

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
(That's when she suddenly collapsed and had to withdraw. Medical
exams revealed her legs had fractured from the strain of her running...
She had to retire.)

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
(This runner was in the middle of a race on a winning streak in her
senior year. She sped up early on the final corner, hoping to overtake
the others from the outside.)

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
(But she suddenly slowed down... She couldn't even cross the finish
line.)

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: (She had to pull out of racing... And she never returned.)

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
(No matter where I look, stories of hopes and dreams being dashed in
an instant keep popping up.)

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: (To think Umamusume are walking such a fine line...)

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: (To think Umamusume are walking such a fine line...)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Excuse me.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Suzuka?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She should be finishing up dinner by now, yet she's standing in front
of me in her tracksuit.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She must plan on doing some solo training. Again, she shows how
devoted she is to going faster and farther than any racer before her.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Um, Trainer, maybe it's just me, but you seem to be staying late a lot
lately...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Is there... something wrong with my current skill set? Are you...
worried I won't win the Takarazuka as I am now?

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: (Not at all... In fact, there isn't a race you can't win as you are now.)

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: (Not at all... In fact, there isn't a race you can't win as you are now.)

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: (The way you run, the power you possess—it's almost overwhelming. Too overwhelming...)

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: (The way you run, the power you possess—it's almost overwhelming. Too overwhelming...)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her brow furrows as she awaits my answer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's gone through so much to achieve her dream. She even switched
teams...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Do I have any right to stop her? To ruin her dreams? Doubt clouds my
mind as I try in vain to find the answer.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Um... I'm not staying late for any particular reason... More importantly,
how are you feeling? Any issues with your legs?

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Um... I'm not staying late for any particular reason... More importantly,
how are you feeling? Any issues with your legs?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Are you, by chance, worried I'm overdoing it?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Then I assure you, I'm fine. Seeing as it's just before a race, I'm being
even more cautious than usual.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
What's more, I feel the best I ever have. There's not a single worry in
my head.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: After all, I have—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She stops, and her gentle expression genuinely appears free of doubt
or worry.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Anyway... I'm going to go for a run. Please don't stay too late.
choice_data_list: All right. You be careful outside.
All right. You be careful outside.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
...Trainer, I can't wait to see what sort of scenery we find at the
Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Up until now, we've been chasing after the scenery she seeks
together...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: What sort of view will she show me at the Takarazuka Kinen?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: What sort of view will she show me at the Takarazuka Kinen?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Will it be a view of her crossing the finish line in record time?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Or perhaps I'll see her as the epitome of strength, besting racers with
double her experience...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Still in the lead is Silence Suzuka! She's nearing the large zelkova tree
marking the third corner!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: (Stop that! Nothing like that is going to happen!)

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
(I need to do more research. If I can just find some common thread, I
can use that to stop—)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Suddenly, something feels wrong. I should be looking at the
documents in front of me, but...

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Everything's... going black...

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Everything's... going black...
